options.name: <input_file_name>
options.description: Specifies the file to be encrypted.

options.name: -pragma
options.description: Specifies to only encrypt the text between the protect begin and protect end NC Protect pragmas. Encryption block must start with pragma protect comment.

options.name: -tcl
options.description: Specifies that the file to be encrypted is a Tcl file. This is the default option.

options.name: -verilog
options.description: Uses Verilog style comments for NC Protect pragmas. (bool, optional) > <file> # Specifies the name of the encrypted file. By default, the encrypted file is printed to standard out (stdout).
